Title: DSF member of the month -  Theresa Seyram Agbenyegah
Description: For March 2026, we welcome Theresa Seyram Agbenyegah as our DSF member of the month! ⭐  Theresa is a passionate community builder serving in the DSF Events Support Working Group. She has demonstrated strong leadership by taking on roles such as Local Organizer Commitee (LOC) Program Lead at PyCon Africa 2024 and Programs Chair for PyCon Ghana 2025.
